'''Farfeld II''' was an astronomical object in the [[Farfeld system/Legends|Farfeld system]]. It was the site of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[System Patrol Squadron]] base guarded by the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] ''[[Olrac Etnom]]'' and [[Cutlass (CR90 corvette)|''Cutlass'']] until it was destroyed by [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{1st}}
